goals.description: Send the final reassurance text to Mina confirming the 90% mark is absolute and I am mentally 'offline,' sealing our social contract so she knows my full attention is hers tonight.

My Assertive nature requires me to cut off this potential doubt immediately rather than letting it fester. This isn't just a task; it's an act of loyalty.

goals.rationale: I need to enforce a hard boundary between 'managing deadlines' and 'being present.' While my long planning horizon usually values future payoff, right now the immediate psychological cost of staying tethered to work outweighs the utility of further studying. Defer until after g1 is sent, as the message itself is the trigger for my true disengagement.
